methodology.scope: Broad tracker scope: all main-tally homicide victims in Arab society in Israel, including mixed cities and East Jerusalem.
methodology.populationSource: CBS Population of Israel on the Eve of the following year
methodology.countryRateSource: World Bank indicator VC.IHR.PSRC.P5, combining high-homicide non-high-income countries above 300,000 residents with Arab countries that have an available value in each selected year and clear the same population threshold
